summary: Ukrainian FPV drones targeted Russian Gerbera drone launchers in Crimea, causing significant damage despite missing direct hits, demonstrating the effectiveness of drone warfare in the region. Russian forces destroyed a Ukrainian T-64 tank in Konstantinovka using coordinated FPV drone attacks, while Ukrainian forces survived an FPV drone strike in the Kostiantinivka direction, with soldiers using drone detectors to identify the threat. Russian Ka-52 helicopter was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, with additional drones striking during the crew's evacuation attempt. Russian forces conducted airstrikes using FAB-3000 and FAB-500 bombs with UMPK on Ukrainian UAV control points in Sumy region and Konstantinovka, and employed cluster RBK-500 bombs with UMPK against Ukrainian UAV control points near Maryevka in Dnipropetrovsk region and forward airfields in Shevchenko, Donetsk People's Republic. Russian mobile fire groups engaged Ukrainian strike drones using the "Yolka" anti-drone system in border regions, achieving kinetic interception at distances exceeding 1.5 km.
